sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>6c33da85dbb47c1087f2892d139619e8</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>30</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>All Open</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Tasker" source="x_153465_discovert">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Tasker">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters_6c33da85dbb47c1087f2892d139619e8</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-06-05 18:50:09</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id>discovertasker_detailsdrilldown</u_banner_list_page_id> <u_banner_list_view_name>sp</u_banner_list_view_name> <u_direction>desc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list>number,parent,parent.u_task_requester,u_request_type,u_requested,u_requested_by,u_request_comments</u_field_list> <u_filter>parent.stateNOT IN3,4,7^u_status=In progress^parent.parentISEMPTY^parent.u_task_requesterDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^ORparent.primary_office.u_global_authoritiesCONTAINSjavascript:gs.getUserID()^ORparent.primary_office.tasking_authoritiesCONTAINSjavascript:gs.getUserID()^ORparent.primary_assignee.tasking_authoritiesCONTAINSjavascript:gs.getUserID()</u_filter> <u_filter_label>All Open</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>banner_task_requests</u_filter_menu_header> <u_filter_page>my_task_home_page</u_filter_page> <u_hover_field>parent</u_hover_field> <u_include_comments>false</u_include_comments> <u_is_custom_filter>false</u_is_custom_filter> <u_modal_title_field_separator>:</u_modal_title_field_separator> <u_modal_title_fields>number,parent</u_modal_title_fields> <u_order>400</u_order> <u_order_by>number</u_order_by> <u_show_in_filter_menu>false</u_show_in_filter_menu> <u_table display_value="Request" name="x_153465_discovert_tasker_requests">05bc6cc9db0401101e1792c5d49619d7</u_table> <u_tooltip/> <u_view_all_page>discovertasker_detailsdrilldown</u_view_all_page> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters> </record_update>
